mapper.insert: insert into release_artifact (release_plan_id, artifact_name, artifact_type, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_hash, download_url, download_count, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, metadata) values (#{releasePlanId}, #{artifactName}, #{artifactType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{downloadUrl}, #{downloadCount}, #{uploadedBy}, now(), #{metadata})
mapper.update: update release_artifact set deleted = 1 where release_artifact_id = #{releaseArtifactId}
mapper.select: SELECT ra.release_artifact_id, ra.release_plan_id, ra.artifact_name, ra.artifact_type, ra.file_name, ra.file_path, ra.file_size, ra.file_hash, ra.download_url, ra.download_count, ra.uploaded_by, ra.uploaded_at, ra.metadata, rp.name AS release_name, su.username AS uploaded_by_name FROM release_artifact ra LEFT JOIN release_plan rp ON ra.release_plan_id = rp.release_plan_id AND rp.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ra.uploaded_by = su.user_id AND su.del_flag = '0' WHERE ra.deleted = 0 AND ra.release_plan_id = #{releasePlanId} ORDER BY ra.uploaded_at DESC
select count(*) from release_artifact where release_plan_id = #{releasePlanId} and deleted = 0
